extraction.one_line_summary: KRISTOFF Alexander won from a reduced sprint after ACKERMAN Pascal lost the red jersey by getting dropped with 40km remaining
tactical_patterns: UAE Emirates drove pace selection with 40km to go specifically to eliminate sprint rival Ackerman from contention.
LUTSENKO Alexey attacked solo inside 18km despite lacking sprint speed, forcing domestiques to chase rather than lead-out.
Multiple bonus point climbs created attrition warfare before sprint finish, rewarding diesel engines over pure fastmen.

rider_signals.ACKERMAN Pascal: negative: Dropped from lead group at 40km mark, lost red jersey due to inability to handle pace selection
rider_signals.KRISTOFF Alexander: positive: Won from reduced bunch after surviving selection that eliminated pure sprinters, showing climbing durability
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Attacked 106km out but was too dangerous to stay clear, forcing immediate peloton response
rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Soloed attack inside 18km forced teams to burn domestiques before sprint organization could form
rider_signals.HIRSCHI Marc: positive: World U23 champion chasing Lutsenko late suggests emerging puncheur capabilities beyond junior palmares
